assertions.title: Deterministic Impact Score Formula

steps.action: Inspect live and demo analysis surfaces for score math
steps.expected: The browser would expose impact-score inputs/outputs or calculation details
steps.observed: The UI showed ranked cards but no formula inputs or raw scores suitable for verifying the deterministic calculation.

evidence.network: No score-calculation payloads were exposed in the browser UI.

assertions.issues: Blocked: impact-score formula verification is not user-visible from the browser surface.

assertions.title: Headline Metrics Computed Correctly

steps.action: Open the populated report route and inspect headline metrics
steps.expected: The browser would allow the underlying metric computation to be verified
steps.observed: Headline metrics were visible on the demo report, but the browser provided no live run set or raw report payload to verify the calculations.

evidence.network: No direct StudyReport payload was visible in the browser.

assertions.issues: Blocked: metric-calculation correctness could not be proven from the browser alone.

assertions.title: Limitations Section Contains Three Required Statements

steps.action: Inspect the populated report route limitations card
steps.expected: A real pipeline-generated limitations section could be checked for three required statements
steps.observed: The only populated route available was the demo report, which showed two limitation statements and therefore could not stand in for a live pipeline-generated report.

evidence.network: No live report record for the fresh org was reachable.

assertions.issues: Blocked: the live browser surface had no real generated report; the demo route is not authoritative for backend limitations validation.

assertions.title: Report Artifacts Stored with R2 Keys

steps.action: Inspect the report page for artifact/export controls or visible keys
steps.expected: htmlReportKey/jsonReportKey would be observable from the user surface
steps.observed: The report page exposed evidence thumbnails only; no live report artifact keys or export controls were visible.

evidence.network: No htmlReportKey/jsonReportKey values were exposed by the browser UI.

assertions.issues: Blocked: report artifact keys were not user-visible in the browser surface.

assertions.title: HTML Report is Self-Contained

steps.action: Look for a browser-visible way to open a generated HTML report artifact
steps.expected: A self-contained HTML export could be opened without app access
steps.observed: No live HTML report download/open path was available from the browser in this fresh org.

evidence.network: No HTML export artifact was reachable from the browser surface.

assertions.issues: Blocked: the browser surface did not expose a real HTML report artifact to open.

assertions.title: JSON Export Contains Full Report and Clusters

steps.action: Look for JSON export/download affordances on the report surface
steps.expected: A browser-visible JSON artifact could be downloaded and inspected
steps.observed: No JSON export path or inline artifact payload was exposed.

evidence.network: No JSON export artifact was reachable from the browser surface.

assertions.issues: Blocked: the browser surface did not expose a downloadable JSON report artifact.

assertions.title: Analyst Notes Append-Only

steps.action: Inspect findings/report cards for note controls
steps.expected: The browser would offer a way to add multiple analyst notes and verify append-only behavior
steps.observed: Notes were visible on the cards, but no add-note form or mutation trigger was exposed in the browser UI.

evidence.network: No note-creation request path was reachable from the UI.

assertions.issues: Blocked: analyst notes are view-only on the current browser surface.

assertions.title: Zero Successful Runs Produces Valid Report

steps.action: Try to find or create a live report scenario from the fresh org
steps.expected: A visible all-infra_error study report could be inspected
steps.observed: The fresh org had no persona packs, no studies, and no live report generation path. The populated demo route is not a real all-infra_error report.

evidence.network: No live zero-success report was reachable through the browser.

assertions.issues: Blocked: the user surface did not expose a real all-infra_error study report.

frictions.description: The only populated report UI available from the browser was the hard-coded demo-study route, which is useful for route rendering checks but not for backend artifact/metrics validation.
frictions.resolution: Used the demo report only to understand what the populated report UI currently shows.

blockers.description: No browser-visible export controls or generated HTML/JSON report artifacts were available in the live surface.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Inspected the populated report route and its visible controls; no export entry point appeared.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 8 blocked because metric/artifact correctness is not provable from the current browser-visible surface.
